HERO.TITLE: Integrate QR code payments into your solution
HERO.MESSAGE: Offer your customers the option to pay using QR codes through a unified API. This integration lets you manage the complete payment lifecycle and automatic sales reconciliation directly from Mercado Pago.

HOW_WORKS.TITLE: How it works
HOW_WORKS.MESSAGE: By integrating QR code payments, your customers can pay instantly by scanning a QR code linked to your Mercado Pago account. After scanning, the amount appears automatically on the customer device, speeding up checkout. The system can generate dynamic QR codes for each transaction, static QR codes for fixed points of sale, or combine both options based on your needs.
HOW_WORKS.SUBTITLE: Collection process
HOW_WORKS.STEP_1: Create the payment order from your system using our unified API.
HOW_WORKS.STEP_2: In your system, generate and display a QR code at the POS screen. It can be dynamic (different for each transaction) or static (the same for all transactions).
HOW_WORKS.STEP_3: The buyer scans the QR and pays with the selected payment method.
HOW_WORKS.STEP_4: Your integrated system receives notifications about the order status.

OFFERS.TITLE: What it offers
OFFERS.MESSAGE: Integrating Mercado Pago API into your system completely transforms the payment experience, unlike non-integrated models where each payment must be processed and reconciled manually.
OFFERS.BLOCK_1_ITEM_1: Static model: fixed QR code associated with a checkout for multiple transactions.
OFFERS.BLOCK_1_ITEM_2: Dynamic model: unique QR code generated specifically for each transaction.
OFFERS.BLOCK_1_ITEM_3: Hybrid model: smart combination of static and dynamic model capabilities.
OFFERS.BLOCK_2_ITEM_1: Manage payments directly from your system.
OFFERS.BLOCK_2_ITEM_3: Automatic reconciliation of operations with Mercado Pago.
OFFERS.BLOCK_3_ITEM_1: Connect your system through one API to manage orders, payments, and notifications.
OFFERS.BLOCK_3_ITEM_2: Integrate different collection solutions without working with multiple separate APIs.
OFFERS.BLOCK_4_ITEM_1: Protect transaction data with HTTPS protocols and OAuth authentication.
OFFERS.BLOCK_4_ITEM_2: The API automatically manages the transaction lifecycle, reducing manual intervention and errors.

DIFF.TITLE: QR code models
DIFF.MESSAGE: Compare available QR integration models and choose the best fit for your business. Check fees.
DIFF.ROW_4: Multiple QR on the same POS

INTEGRATE.TITLE: How to integrate
INTEGRATE.SUBTITLE: Learn the required steps to integrate QR Code.
INTEGRATE.REQ_APP_TEXT: You need the Mercado Pago app installed on your phone to sign in. Download it for Android or iOS.
INTEGRATE.REQ_ACCOUNT_TEXT: You need a Mercado Pago (or Mercado Libre) user to have a seller account, either for your own integration or for third parties.
INTEGRATE.PROCESS_1: Create an application in Your integrations.
INTEGRATE.PROCESS_2: Set up your branch and checkout.
